name: ? Bing
page_title: ? Bing ?昺 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Bing’s personal name is unknown. With rank as a general and enfeoffment as a village marquis, in AD 220 he was a sponsor of a stele commemorating Cao Pi’s assumption of the imperial title. (1)

1: Source: [CITE=RAFE:TOME]

full_text:
? Bing ?昺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
? Bing (?昺). General who took part in a stele about Cao Pi’s rise to the Imperial Throne. ? Bing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
